description: [ELON] Create scheduled reconciliation job (runs every 6 hours via cron or setInterval). Queries Shopify for order count in last 7 days, compares to shopify_orders table count. If discrepancy > 5%, triggers full sync via ShopifySyncService.fetchRecentOrders(). Logs reconciliation results to activity_log. Sends notification to owner if sync fails 3 times in a row (uses existing notification system).
successCriteria: Reconciliation job runs every 6 hours (verify with logs)
Discrepancies detected when order counts don't match
Full sync triggered when discrepancy threshold exceeded
Owner notified after 3 consecutive sync failures
Job can be manually triggered via /api/shopify/reconcile endpoint
